description: Paths to Glory Patch 1 (7 August 2024) — Albion Journal mission reward changes, Territory Raiding energy change, UI Improvements, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Bows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Frost Staffs, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Shoes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Albion Journal
items: 'Visit all six Royal Cities': Monk's Hood → Monk's Sandals
'Catch 15 different fish': Blue Bard's Hat → Blue Bard's Shoes
'Finish 40 hunts': 5 Tomes of Learning → 1 Tome of Learning
'Own a million Silver': Innkeeper's Hat → Master's Tome of Insight
'Own a billion Silver': 500 Community Tokens → Expert's Tome of Learning
'Loot 5 different Baby Animals': 5 Elder's Bags of Silver → Elder's Tome of Insight
Scrolls of Repair earned as Journal rewards are now non-tradable (those earned prior to this patch remain tradable)
sections.searchable_text: Albion Journal mission rewards Royal Cities fish hunts Silver Baby Animals Scrolls of Repair non-tradable

sections.heading: Territory Raiding
items: The percentage of stored energy that is destroyed when unlocking Raw Energy Cores has been increased from 1% to 5%
sections.searchable_text: Territory Raiding stored energy destroyed Raw Energy Cores 1% 5%

sections.heading: Other
items: Randomized Dungeons shown on the Minimap in the Roads of Avalon now continue to display enchantment VFX after a player has entered (does not apply to randomly spawned dungeons in Hideout regions)
sections.searchable_text: Randomized Dungeons Minimap Roads of Avalon enchantment VFX Hideout regions

sections.heading: UI Improvements
items: Added pop-up notifications for the completion of individual Journal missions
Entries in the drop-down list in the Island Merchant UI now display visual cues to reflect the player's ownership and Guild permission status
sections.searchable_text: UI Improvements Journal missions pop-up notifications Island Merchant ownership Guild permission

subsections.heading: Shoes

changes.raw_text: Spectral Run: Previously auto-attacks disabled for 3s after moving more than 15m (after invisibility ends). Now: damage reduced by 50% for 3s after moving more than 15m (after invisibility ends).
notes: Previously: auto-attacks disabled for 3 seconds after moving more than 15m (after invisibility ends)
Now: damage reduced by 50% for 3 seconds after moving more than 15m (after invisibility ends)

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Multiple Albion Journal fixes: Loot Baby Animals from corpse, vanity item duplicates, Snow Leopard Cape item/unlock, resource mobs in Mists skinning, hide animals/treasures counted as unique types (added 'Skin 52 types' and 'Skin 65 types' mission steps), Journey Back zone fix, mob kill party members, Brecilien standing, Phalanx Beetle battle mount, crafting missions, progress bar percentage display
UI fixes: speech bubble display priority, mount health bars and spellcasting bars, Journey Back ESC popup, Destiny Board/World Map with Journal Tracker, [Mobile] mail notifications during tutorial
Fixed various mob spawning issues in Randomized Dungeons: boss encounters spawning twice, elite/veteran mobs in solo dungeons, multiple groups spawning at once
Fixed issue where cooldown reduction buffs could cause longer than intended cooldowns for Crystal Reaper, Panther Shape, and Imp Shape
Fixed issue where Territory Activity Chest shield visual states would not change when standing next to them
Fixed issue where Victory Emotes would activate if a player used the '/die' command when 'also trigger on knockdown' was enabled
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
